intro.heading: Join us in celebrating music in the Puget Sound area.
body: The Redmond Tech Orchestra (RTO) has been instrumental in enriching the arts community in the greater Puget Sound area. Founded by a couple of musicians working in tech, we are on a mission to provide opportunities for working adults to continue playing their instrument and sharing their love of music with the community.
Come join RTO at one of our concerts throughout the year, and be amazed at our musicians' talent!
